title: MCTiersBridge
description: A fast minecraft plugin that retrieves data from the official mctiers.com backend to display players their rank ingame.
body:
# Mctiers plugin
A minecraft plugin that retrieves data from the official mctiers.com backend using their api. Using PAPI the plugin displays rank data found in the backend with many different placeholders. This also comes with a developer API you can use in your plugins. Most can be found in the support discord and github.

### Example placeholders
```
- %TierBridge_vanilla_{player}% - Returns the vanilla tier of the player.
- %TierBridge_overall_{player}% - Returns the overall rank of the player.
- %TierBridge_region_{player}% - Returns the region of the player.
- %TierBridge_points_{player}% - Returns the overall points of the player.
```

## Available types
- `vanilla` - Vanilla tier
- `sword` - Sword tier
- `pot` - Pot tier
- `uhc` - uhc tier
- `smp` - smp tier
- `overall` - Overall rank
- `region` - Region
- `points` - Overall points

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/231ced5b854f7e772915c27fee90107f09e93710.png)


##### Disclaimer: This plugin is not officially affiliated with mctiers and the plugin icon is not owned by us but rather by ([https://mctiers.com/](https://mctiers.com/))
